JFWRules.GeneralRules1: Jack Frost's Winter is a 3 or more reels, 4-row video slot featuring Infinity Reels, increasing multipliers, and expanding Wild symbols.
JFWRules.GeneralRules2: The game is played with 10 base bet (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
JFWRules.GeneralRules4: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
JFWRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination3: On any spin, if the rightmost reel does not improve any winning combination and there is a Free Spins symbol on the rightmost reel, then an extra reel is added to the right.
JFWRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination4: The added extra reel is spun, and if it again improves any winning combination, then another extra reel is added and so on.
JFWRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination5: Wins are calculated once no extra reel is added.
JFWRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination7: A combination win in cash is equal to the value shown in the "Paytable" multiplied by bet size and bet level.

JFWCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination1: At every spin starting with 3 reels, any combinations of 5 or more symbols (excluding Free Spins symbol) from the leftmost reel will result in a winning combination.
JFWCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination2: On any spin, if the rightmost reel improves any winning combination, then an extra reel is added to the right.
JFWCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination6: For every winning combination, payout is made for each symbol according to the "Paytable".
JFWCommonRules.WildsExplaination1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Free Spins symbol.
JFWCommonRules.WildsExplaination2: Wild symbol appears on all reels except reel 1.

JFWMultiplier.Title: Multiplier
JFWMultiplier.MultiplierExplaination1: At the start of any main game spins, the win multiplier is x1.
JFWMultiplier.MultiplierExplaination2: During any main game spins, the win multiplier increases by 1 for every extra reel added.
JFWMultiplier.MultiplierExplaination3: Wins are then multiplied by the win multiplier and paid once no extra reel is added.

JFWExpandingWild.Title: Expanding Wild Feature
JFWExpandingWild.ExpandingWildExplaination1: Any Wild symbol that appears on the reels and is involved in any win will expand across entire reel.

JFWFreeSpinRules.Title: Free Spins Feature
JFWFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination1: 3 Free Spins symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Free Spins symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
JFWFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination2: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, the win multiplier is x1.
JFWFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination3: During any free spin, the win multiplier increases by 1 for every extra reel added.
JFWFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination4: 1 free spin is awarded for each Heart symbol on the reels (if any).
JFWFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination5: Win multiplier is increased by 1 for each Star symbol on the reels (if any).
